daily.label: Daily operations
daily.description: Refresh data, verify quality, snapshot signal, and rebuild app-facing status.

daily-recertify.label: Daily best-strategy test
daily-recertify.description: Retest the certified leaderboard and rank it by current confidence before the daily signal.

daily-governance.label: Daily governance check
daily-governance.description: Evaluate whether the active champion is ok, watch, or blocked.

daily-notifications.label: Daily notification scan
daily-notifications.description: Convert important operations events into notification outbox entries.

daily-research-supervisor.label: Daily approved research planner
daily-research-supervisor.description: Create bounded run artifacts for approved strategy research ideas.

daily-strategy-review.label: Daily best-strategy check
daily-strategy-review.description: Confirm the active strategy is the highest-confidence certified leaderboard strategy.

weekly-recertify.label: Weekly Gold recertification
weekly-recertify.description: Revalidate the current Gold leaderboard under current rules.

monthly-confidence-vintage.label: Monthly Confidence v2 calibration
monthly-confidence-vintage.description: Run broader confidence calibration diagnostics when explicitly enabled.
